CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, category String, value UInt32);
SELECT category, groupUniqArray(value) FROM test_table GROUP BY category;
SELECT category, groupUniqArray(2)(value) FROM test_table GROUP BY category;
CREATE TABLE test_table_large AS test_table ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table_large SELECT * FROM test_table;
SELECT category, groupUniqArray(value) FROM test_table_large GROUP BY category HAVING category IN ('A', 'B');
SELECT category, groupUniqArray(value) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT category, value FROM test_table) AS unique_values GROUP BY category;
SELECT category, groupUniqArray(3)(value) FROM test_table GROUP BY category ORDER BY category;
WITH (SELECT DISTINCT category FROM test_table) AS categories SELECT c.category, groupUniqArray(value) FROM categories AS c JOIN test_table AS t ON c.category = t.category GROUP BY c.category;
SELECT category, groupUniqArray(value) FROM (SELECT category, value FROM test_table WHERE value > 15) AS filtered_row GROUP BY category;
